headline: American Tower’s Valuation After Upgrade Highlighting CoreSite Growth And 5G Leasing Demand
summary: Mizuho’s upgrade of American Tower (AMT) to Outperform, tied to CoreSite’s data center growth and stronger 5G driven leasing demand, has pushed investors to reassess the REIT’s mix of tower and data center earnings. See our latest analysis for American Tower. Despite the upgrade, American Tower’s recent trading has been subdued, with a 30 day share price return decline of 4.18% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 15.82%. This suggests sentiment is still recovering even as...
